title: verbascum × sterile
intro: Verbascum × sterile, also known as sterile mullein, is a sterile hybrid of the Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum phoeniceum species of flowering plants. This biennial herb has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe respiratory issues, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Verbascum × sterile include reducing inflammation, calming coughs, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and eczema. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, salves, and infusions, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers to release their medicinal properties.
